text:
Example 8 : A pole has to be
erected at a point on
the boundary of a circular park of
diameter
13
metres
in
such
a way
that
the
differences
of its
distances
from
two
diametrically opposite fixed g
gates A and B on the boundary is 7 1
 metres. Is it possible to
do so? If
yes, at what
t distances
from
the two
gates should the
pole be erected?
